rec_specific_object.locator: Pasted text.txt plus three 20260611-14xxxx RTX3090 result archives
rec_specific_object.summary: User-provided v1.7.1 console output and real result archives for qwen3.6:27b and qwen3.6:35b, showing observed/warm load-state and residency issues.
ADOS improved requirements for materialized state, evidence ledger, package hygiene, test pressure, self-evaluation, and AI playground alignment.

rec_specific_object.raw_request: Review three new test results; use v1.7.1 to plan improvements; ensure tests do not depend on currently loaded model and by default empty RTX card; use three prompts for coding, essay, and internet access; add ollama.sh wrapper; support several models in command line; reduce logic redundancy; align with attached ADOS requirements; produce v1.8.
rec_specific_object.normalized_request: Produce ollama-info v1.8 from v1.7.1 with empty-card default, ADOS capability prompts, unified wrapper, multi-model support, redundancy cleanup, ADOS evidence, delivery zip, and quality evidence zip.

rec_specific_object.statement: Default tests must clear currently loaded Ollama models and record empty-card verification evidence before the first benchmark request.
Default generation tests must run three prompts that probe coding capability, essay capability, and internet-access boundary behavior.
The package must provide a unified ollama.sh wrapper with multi-model test and bench commands while reducing duplicated bashrc and bench logic.

rec_specific_object.method: bash -n syntax checks over package scripts and bashrc.
Deterministic fake Ollama run verifies load_mode=empty-card, empty_card_requested=1, empty_card_verified=1, and load_state_verdict=empty_card_verified.
Fake run and payload inspection verify 01_coding_first_prompt, 02_essay_second_prompt, and 03_internet_access_third_prompt are emitted by default.
Route-only checks verify ollama.sh test and ollama.sh bench accept multiple models and route embedding/generation roles correctly.
Package hygiene scan verifies no run artifacts, caches, nested zips, legacy clutter, .pyc files, or .DS_Store files are present in the release boundary.

rec_specific_object.statement: Sandbox verification uses fake Ollama/NVIDIA shims and cannot measure real RTX 3090 throughput or model quality.
rec_specific_object.mitigation: State limitation and require target-workstation runs for real performance evidence.

cleanup_actions: Generated v1.8 ADOS review, verification, self-evaluation, and package hygiene evidence.

rec_specific_object.hash_scope: package zip checksum emitted separately in ollama-info-v1.8.zip.sha256
